scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build && electron-builder --dir --publish never --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build && electron-builder --publish never --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis-web --publish never --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:dist:win:x64: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis-web --x64 --publish never --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:dist:win:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis-web --arm64 --publish never --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:dist:linux:x64: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64 --publish never --config electron-builder.config.cjs
